text: {"claims":[{"statement":"Higher egg consumption of more than one egg per day was associated with a modest increase in the risk of cardiovascular disease among participants with type 2 diabetes.","population":"participants with type 2 diabetes","intervention":"more than one egg per day","comparator":"lower egg consumption","outcome":"risk of cardiovascular
